plugins.name: idea-to-deploy
plugins.description: Complete project lifecycle methodology for Claude Code — 25 skills + 7 specialized subagents + 13 hooks. Product discovery, planning, scaffolding, coding, testing, debugging, optimization, security audit (Red/Blue Team), dependency audit, DB migrations, production server migration, deployment, hardening, IaC, session persistence, strategic replanning, advisory mode, legacy project adoption, safety guardrails, skill enforcement.
